title: Dutch Pepper Fritters
description: A sweet and crispy fritter recipe that combines the spices of the Netherlands with a kick of pepper.

ingredients.name: Chewy sweetener
ingredients.notes: Can be replaced with sugar or honey

instructions: In a large bowl combine the flour, stir fry mix, sweetener, pepper, and salt.
Crack in the egg and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until smooth.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces.
Shape each piece into a ball and then flatten slightly into a disk.
Heat a non-stick pan with a small amount of oil over medium heat.
Fry the fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side or until golden brown.
Remove the fritters from the pan and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
